name: To The Ratmobile!
tips: Tutors 2 Rats from your deck to hand. This thins your deck and guarantees you have Rat plays for the next two turns.
The best targets to tutor are Rathopper (leap threat) and Emberplague Rat (Decay-Phase burn) — they have the highest individual impact.
Play this mid-game when you need to reload after deploying your early Rats. Two fresh Rats in hand keeps the pressure on.
The tutored Rats also serve as Giant Rat promote insurance. Having Rats in hand means you can always play a new promote target if your board gets wiped.
At 3 mana with no board impact, this is a tempo loss on the turn you play it. Use it on a turn where the opponent can't punish you for not developing the board.
rulings: tutor_target matches any card in your deck with the 'Rat' tribe — Common Rat, Giant Rat, Rathopper, Emberplague Rat, and Ratchanter (composite tribe 'Mage Rat' counts) all qualify. Furryroach is tribe Insect and is NOT a valid target.

Picks are sequential: the modal stays open until both picks resolve, no matches remain, or you decline early. Tutoring with a full hand (10 cards) burns the picked Rat to your Exhaust Pile face-up instead of adding it to hand — the pick is still consumed.
Picking fewer than 2 Rats when more exist in deck wastes the effect — no refund.
If fewer than 2 matching Rats are in deck, the modal caps at the available count (e.g. 1 match = only 1 pick available). You may still decline instead of picking.
